landing.testimonials.title: Why citizens love it
landing.testimonials.q1: I never thought picking up litter could earn me free metro rides. My weekly walks feel different now.
landing.testimonials.q1.author: Nino, Vake district
landing.testimonials.q2: The leaderboard got my whole apartment block competing. Our street has never been cleaner.
landing.testimonials.q2.author: Giorgi, Saburtalo
landing.testimonials.q3: Being recognized on the City Hall display made my grandkids so proud. That meant more than any voucher.
landing.testimonials.q3.author: Babo Tamuna, Old Tbilisi
landing.final.title: Ready to join?
landing.footer.tagline: A civic platform built for Tbilisi.

news.title: News
news.pilot.title: Pilot launches in Vake district
news.pilot.body: Tbilisi City Hall has signed the pilot memorandum. First validated deeds are being logged today.
news.milestone.title: 10,000 citizens have joined
news.milestone.body: Less than a month in and the community has crossed five-figure registrations. Sanitation cost offset on track for ₾2.1M Year 1.
news.partner.title: Magti joins as CSR partner
news.partner.body: Free mobile data top-ups for top-level contributors. Redeemable from the Rewards tab starting next week.
news.cotyOpen.title: Citizen of the Year 2026 nominations open
news.cotyOpen.body: The Mayor's office will co-sign one annual digital badge. Top contributors across all districts qualify.
submit.demoNotice: Demo mode — any photo or video earns points instantly. No AI validation.
submit.proof.optional: Optional — proof file (skip for instant points)
page.about.title: About Tbilisi Care
page.about.missionBody: Tbilisi Care converts everyday acts of kindness into measurable civic impact. Citizens do small good deeds — clean a street, feed a stray, help a senior — and earn points redeemable for real-world rewards from City Hall and partner businesses.
page.about.how1: Do a small good deed in Tbilisi.
page.about.how2: Snap a photo or video as proof.
page.about.how4: Earn points, climb levels, redeem rewards.
page.news.title: News
page.news.sub: Updates from City Hall and partners
page.partners.title: Partners
page.partners.ctaBody: Want your business to appear in our Rewards marketplace? Get in touch.
page.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
page.privacy.body: We collect the minimum data needed to validate good deeds and award points: your name, phone or email, profile photo, deed videos/photos, and approximate GPS at submission. Data is stored on servers in Georgia and we do not sell or share personal information with third parties. You can request deletion at any time via the Contact page.
page.terms.title: Terms of Service
page.terms.body: By using Tbilisi Care you agree to submit only your own genuine acts. Fraudulent submissions, AI-generated proofs, and duplicate accounts result in permanent suspension and forfeit of points and rewards. Points have no cash value and cannot be transferred between accounts. Rewards are redeemable subject to partner inventory.
page.contact.title: Contact us
